title: Tweaks SMP
description: SMP Tweaks is a lightweight resource pack for PVP/SMP that improves visuals and gameplay. It adds clearer water, low shield, improved brewing GUI, ore outline, animated items, immersive 3D redstone,and lot more
body:
SMP Tweaks is a lightweight and immersive Minecraft resource pack designed to improve your SMP (Survival Multiplayer) or PVP experience. It focuses on subtle visual enhancements and gameplay tweaks that make the game cleaner, more intuitive, and enjoyable.

With SMP Tweaks, water becomes more transparent for a smoother look, and many small but meaningful tweaks are added to enhance your play
## Features

- darker GUI's

- Clearer water for a cleaner aesthetic.

- Low shield visuals.

- Improved brewing stand GUI.

- Reduced fire visuals.

- ore outlines & Connected textures.

- Animated items for more lively gameplay.

- Immersive 3D redstone display.

- Various redstone improvements and tweaks.

- suspicious sand, Gravel and budding amethyst Outline

- Mini water/lava/bucket 
  
- Mini food
  
- 3D endcrystal
  
- Small Particles

## Credits & Resources Used

All credits for the resources used are preserved in the included "README.CREDITS" file.

SMP Tweaks combines these improvements to give your survival world a cleaner, more modern, and immersive feel without changing the core Minecraft experience.
